description_long: This object is a decayed, carved pumpkin with a pronounced, twisted stem and a sunken, wrinkled surface. The pumpkin's face features menacing, slanted eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible folds and patches of discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The interior is partially visible through the mouth and eyes, revealing a hollow cavity typical of carved pumpkins. The coloration is predominantly a faded orange with some lighter and darker patches, and the stem is a dull brown. The pumpkin sits on a flat, circular base, likely to stabilize it for display.
description: A decayed, carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a twisted stem, sunken features, and a wide, jagged mouth, sitting on a flat base.
description_view_0: The left side of the pumpkin shows a prominent eye cutout and the wrinkled, sunken surface with the stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: The back of the pumpkin is visible, showing the rough, uneven surface and some discoloration, with no facial features present.
description_view_2: The right side of the pumpkin highlights the twisted stem and the collapsed, wrinkled body, with part of the mouth cutout visible.
description_view_3: The front view displays the carved face with slanted eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, emphasizing the jack-o'-lantern expression.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with slanted, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth. The style is expressive and organic, with irregular cutouts and a decayed, collapsed appearance. No geometric or abstract motifs are present.
